title: lolium mazzettianum
intro: Lolium mazzettianum, also known as Italian ryegrass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lolium mazzettianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used externally to treat wounds or internally to aid in digestion.
